controls.title: Design Controls
controls.overhangHint: 0 = flush with legs | higher = tabletop extends beyond legs.
controls.legroomPositionHint: Position of the empty legroom space (0 = leftmost, {max} = rightmost).
controls.deskDensityHint: 0% = fewest shelves (1 row) | 100% = most shelves (5 rows).
controls.legsHint: Add four square corner legs below the cabinet body.
controls.defaultColumnHeightHint: Sets all columns to this height. Fine-tune individual columns in the Columns config tab.
controls.columnHeightHint: Each column can have a different height for a staggered profile.
controls.hugeCellDoorHint: Adds a full-height door covering the entire opening.
controls.maxDoorsHint: Max doors cannot be combined with max drawers.
controls.noColumnsAvailable: No columns available. Adjust the width to add columns.
controls.noRowsAvailable: No rows available. Adjust the bookcase height to add rows.
controls.hugeCellDescription: Removes internal horizontal shelves, making the column one tall opening.
controls.openCubbyDescription: One tall opening — ideal for books or a lamp.

errors.invalidConfigDesc: The model configuration is missing or invalid.

guide.subtitle: Create in just a few clicks
guide.title: Design once, love forever

slide1.title: Start with the Perfect Design
slide1.description: Explore a curated collection of customizable furniture designs. Whether your style is modern, classic, or somewhere in between, begin with a piece that fits your vision.

slide2.title: Personalize Every Detail
slide2.description: Choose the size, materials, finishes, and features that suit your space. From fabric to wood tones, every detail can be tailored to match your lifestyle and taste.

slide3.title: Crafted by Experts
slide3.description: Once your design is finalized, skilled craftsmen bring it to life with precision and care. Each piece is made to order, ensuring exceptional quality and attention to detail.

slide4.title: Delivered & Enjoyed
slide4.description: Your custom piece arrives ready to transform your space. Built to last and designed for everyday living, it's furniture made just for you — and made to stay.

categories.subtitle: The future of furniture
categories.title: Made to fit. Made to stay. Made simple.Customize yours.

makers.title: Become a maker
makers.description: Have a talent or love making furniture? Join our elite force and showcase your skills and connect with clients who value custom craftsmanship.

quotes.1: Good furniture starts with honest wood, careful hands, and patience in every cut.
quotes.2: Every joint tells a story — strong craftsmanship turns simple wood into lasting furniture.
quotes.3: Measure twice, cut once — precision is what makes a piece stand the test of time.
quotes.4: Design is important, but true beauty appears when the wood grain guides the craft.
quotes.5: Handcrafted furniture carries character — every curve and edge shaped with intention.
quotes.6: A well-built table isn't just furniture — it's where families gather for years.
quotes.7: Craftsmanship is the balance between strength, simplicity, and the natural beauty of wood.
quotes.8: The best furniture pieces are built slowly, shaped by skill rather than machines.
quotes.9: Every handcrafted piece carries the mark of the maker behind it.

ourStory.p1: It carried the mark of the craftsman — the subtle curve of a hand-finished edge, the precision of a joint cut with care, the pride of someone who built it to last.
ourStory.p2: Today, much of the furniture industry is controlled by large galleries and showrooms. Mass production replaced craftsmanship. Customers choose from what’s available — not from what they truly want. Meanwhile, thousands of skilled carpenters remain unseen, competing for limited exposure rather than for their actual talent.
ourStory.p3: We believe there is a better way!
ourStory.p4: Customers are forced to buy what galleries display.
ourStory.p5: Custom furniture is expensive, slow, and often inaccessible.
ourStory.p6: Skilled carpenters struggle to find consistent, fair opportunities.
ourStory.p7: Talent exists — but visibility does not.
ourStory.title3: The system favors middlemen, not makers.
ourStory.p8: We built a platform that brings craftsmanship back to the center.Instead of browsing finished products, customers start with an idea.
ourStory.p10: Customize dimensions, materials, finishes, and details
ourStory.p11: Post their project to a community of verified carpenters
ourStory.title6: From there, professional craftsmen compete by submitting
ourStory.p19: Direct connection between maker and customer.
ourStory.p16Desc: Every bid is tailored to your specific budget and requirements.
ourStory.p17Desc: Know exactly when your piece will arrive, from start to finish.
ourStory.p18Desc: Your design, your materials, your dimensions. No compromises.
ourStory.p19Desc: Talk directly with the artisan crafting your future heritage.

jobs.title: My Jobs
jobs.description: Manage your active commissions, review artisan bids, and track the progress of your bespoke furniture pieces.
jobs.noJobsFoundDesc: You haven't posted any jobs yet. Start by creating a custom furniture design!

errors.cannotStart: Cannot start the job because it is no longer in the 'Open' status. It might have been canceled or already started.
